title: CR Craft
description: RLcraft inspired modpack with Create Mod. Focused on "realism" and Create Mod.
body:
![A Minecraft style title of "CR Craft"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f51c104e30ea62996c9427fa9093bd59967cd576.png)

**RLCraft** inspired, realism-focused and **Create Mod** oriented modpack.  
Includes various features like **Thirst**, **Temperature**, **Realistic Damage**, **Realistic Animal Butchering/Harvesting**, and the **Create Mod** with multiple addons.  
Also includes **Farmer's Delight** together with its addons.

Inspirations: RLCraft, Don't Starve "Uncompromising Mode", Better than wolves, Other cool survival games and my brain.

- This modpack is meant to be difficult. You will likely die, ALOT

**Best experienced on hardcore mode :)** _But for the fist playthrough maybe use survival._

![A minecraft-style title saying "progession changes"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e4f93590fcd5c180f1f4242cdb551c5a3d72ca4_0.webp)

Main Progression changes include:

- Integration of Create Mod into the progression in the form of custom and changed recipes.
- Making Exploration and the Wither boss fight required for progression.
- Slowing down the early game stages.
Plus some more minor changes.

![Minecraft-style title saying "mob tweaks"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41042d198a045c70c7ae8dc4103c6d109fe411c3.png)

Main mob AI and behaviour changes include:

- Some passive mobs will fight back.
- Some neutral mobs will attack on sight.
- Hostile (UNDEAD) mobs will attempt to group up to collecively end your life.
- Hostile (UNDEAD) mobs will now move towards light sources and sounds.
- Sometimes hostile mobs will move in groups.
- Now theres progressive difficulty scaling based on how far you have gotten.
Plus~~~~ More

![Minecraft-style title saying "food changes"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9154009c7943ac7136f1985f614b3d569d510215.png)

Main food and nutrition changes include:

- MANY new foods and dishes have been added.
- Diminishing food returns have been added.

![Minecraft-style title saying "survival changes"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ef51dc5f21a7de1311a1947c6955990a49bcfb7_0.webp)

Main survival changes include:

- Added thirst bar.
- Added temperature bar.
- Added lack of oxygen at extreme depths or altitudes.

![Minecraft-style title saying "info"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3adcea137b601d5f22651ab9591b7084619750ed_0.webp)

Extra info:

**[1.4.1+] Make sure to check the FTB quest line found top left in inventory screen.**

Give suggestions / report bugs in the [DISCORD](https://discord.gg/WfttY4tQjv)

> _I **HIGHLY** recommend tweaking your graphics settings and adjusting the selection of resource packs to your liking._  
> **KNOWN ISSUES:** A JEI addon SOMETIMES displays bugged mob models **if Fresh Animations is enabled. For an unknown reason being in a body of water sometimes randomly causes you to get struck by lightining.**

GOOD LUCK.

NOTE: This Modpack is ment to be more "fair" than RlCraft. No random mob spawning from breaking blocks and ending your run. Pretty much every death IS avoidable if you are aware of your surroundings and don't take too big of risks. **This is also my first real modpack!**
